response:
the modulus of the complex number $z$ is exactly 2 because the equation $iz = \sqrt{3} - i$ implies $|z| = \frac{|\sqrt{3} - i|}{|i|} = \frac{\sqrt{3 + 1}}{1} = 2$

this result holds true regardless of the specific argument of $z$ since multiplying by $i$ only rotates the complex number without changing its magnitude
